template_source.name: Copy of 2025 Procore Presentation Template.pptx
template_source.asset_policy: Use extracted template assets for logo lockups, texture backgrounds, hero images, and approved icons. Do not redraw these marks manually.

logo_rules.placement: Bottom-left Procore wordmark with top-right hexagon mark, matching the approved template layout.
logo_rules.clear_space: At least 0.2 in around the lockup.
logo_rules.background_rule: Use charcoal text on light backgrounds and white text on dark backgrounds.
do_not: Do not stretch, rotate, recolor, or place the lockup over busy imagery.
Do not replace the wordmark with an unapproved logo.

forbidden_rules: Do not invent new slide layouts outside the approved layout list.
Do not use unapproved colors, gradients, shadows, or decorative effects in generated slides.
Do not resize logos inconsistently between slides.
Do not place more text than the layout maximums allow.
Do not allow AI-generated prose to select fonts, colors, charts, or object positions.
Do not use chart types outside the approved chart list for each layout.
Do not expose model names, API providers, or generation internals in client-facing decks.

approved_layouts.name: Title Client Report
approved_layouts.purpose: Opening title slide for a client-facing adoption report.

approved_layouts.name: Agenda
approved_layouts.purpose: Sets the report sequence and discussion flow.

approved_layouts.name: Executive Summary
approved_layouts.purpose: Summarizes adoption health, business impact, and decisions needed.

approved_layouts.name: Adoption KPI Scorecard
approved_layouts.purpose: Shows the key adoption metrics for the selected report period.

approved_layouts.name: Usage Trend
approved_layouts.purpose: Shows adoption score and active user trend across report periods.

approved_layouts.name: Feature Adoption
approved_layouts.purpose: Compares major workflow usage and highlights strongest and weakest features.

approved_layouts.name: Risks & Recommendations
approved_layouts.purpose: Links adoption risks to practical recommendations.

approved_layouts.name: Next Steps
approved_layouts.purpose: Closes the report with action owners, milestones, or source notes.
